Meta.Goal: Compact AGENTS instructions into stable RAG task rows, LoRA stabilizer labels, and repository-scoped coding tasks.

Task.Title: Bootstrap repository inventory
Task.InstructionSummary: Initialize the repository inventory before any deterministic MoA routing begins.

Task.Title: Generate sub-agent contract
Task.InstructionSummary: Refresh the deterministic Planner/Architect/Coder/Tester/Reviewer contract file.

Task.Title: Plan-only MoA run
Task.InstructionSummary: Route a task in dry-run mode first to keep command execution deterministic.
Task.ContextChunk: python C:\Users\eqhsp\.codex\skills\moa-cli-coding-fabric\scripts\run_moa_task.py --repo "C:\Users\eqhsp\Documents\GitHub\A2A_MCP" --task "Describe and plan the task" --mode auto

Task.Title: Execute guarded checks
Task.InstructionSummary: Run repo checks only after policy evaluation and only within repo scope.

Task.Title: Require explicit release confirmation
Task.InstructionSummary: High-risk release operations require an explicit confirmation flag before execution.

Task.Title: Fallback from pgvector to local context
Task.InstructionSummary: Auto retrieval chooses pgvector only when manifest and Docker health checks pass; otherwise it falls back to deterministic local context.
Task.ContextChunk: Auto chooses pgvector only when manifest and Docker health checks pass; otherwise local context is used.

Task.Title: Enforce repo-scoped mutation
Task.InstructionSummary: Coding agents may inspect the whole GitHub workspace but must mutate only the repo selected by --repo.
Task.ContextChunk: Primary scope is all repositories under Documents/GitHub, but mutations remain repo-scoped by --repo.

Task.Title: Persist run artifacts for replay
Task.InstructionSummary: Each routed run persists plan.json and execution.json so RAG chunks can compact context without rereading raw console history.

Task.Title: Compact instruction context into chunkable tasks
Task.InstructionSummary: Convert top-level AGENTS instructions into stable CSV rows that carry summaries, chunk text, vector slots, and output targets for coding agents.
Task.ContextChunk: Summarize instructions into agent-task chunks with explicit embedding slots and token budgets.

BacklogItem.Title: Create a NavigationView-based coding-agent shell
BacklogItem.ImplementationShape: MainWindow with NavigationView and minimal stable destinations
BacklogItem.Purpose: Host Instructions, Task Catalog, Repo Infrastructure, and Artifact views in a native desktop shell.

BacklogItem.Title: Split Pages, Services, Styles, and ViewModels cleanly
BacklogItem.Purpose: Keep RAG task browsing and artifact inspection maintainable as the host grows.

BacklogItem.Title: Add spreadsheet and CSV import services
BacklogItem.ImplementationShape: Services layer for workbook, XML, and CSV ingestion
BacklogItem.Purpose: Load the generated instruction pack into the desktop host without custom parsing in page code.

BacklogItem.Title: Expose a compact RAG task browser
BacklogItem.ImplementationShape: Task catalog page with filters for role, repo, priority, and embedding slot
BacklogItem.Purpose: Let coding agents and operators browse the compacted context-window tasks quickly.
